infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos of your meals for AI-powered calorie tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select food photos from your library for calorie tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Calories Coach uses your location to find nearby gyms, restaurants, and parks.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Calories Coach reads your steps, active calories, and workouts from Apple Health to show your full energy balance.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Calories Coach reads health data to calculate your net calorie balance.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Calories Coach uses your location to find nearby gyms, restaurants, and parks.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Calories Coach uses your location to find nearby gyms, restaurants, and parks.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Calories Coach reads your steps, active calories, and workouts from Apple Health to show your full energy balance.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Calories Coach reads health data to calculate your net calorie balance.
